column5: January 2021 update - I initially started this binge over the summer to try and see some more "classic" films but obviously (and sadly) never got around to finishing :/ I don't think I'll continue this in the near future, but I'll keep updating it as I see films from the list. This is the binge I'm starting that I feel is most important right now. I'm still a blossoming cinephile, and these 95 films are specifically recommended by Spike Lee for up and coming filmmakers. It's a list of movies I will look back on in the future because of being recommended by Spike Lee himself. So it's going to age with time. Here's the list

column2: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
